description: Redis cache became unresponsive due to a network partition. This caused cascading timeouts across api-gateway, user-service, and inventory-service. Response times jumped from ~150ms to 25s+ with error rates reaching 25%.
expected_root_cause: Redis cache network partition — all cache-dependent services affected
